---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

Please describe the problem you are trying to solve. (e.g., "I'm frustrated when I have to manually paste 50 variables...")

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Workflow: How would the user interact with this?

## Outcome: What does the final result look like?

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Which part of ScrubDuck is this for?

[ ] VS Code Extension
[ ] Python Engine (Sanitizer Logic)
[ ] Chrome Extension (Future)
[ ] Enterprise Dashboard (Future)
